description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and defines three stages: build, test, and release. In the build stage add a job named build that runs `yarn install --frozen-lockfile` and saves the node_modules directory as an artifact that expires after one month. In the release stage add a job named release that depends on build, runs only for tag pipelines, writes the NPM authentication token to ~/.npmrc with `echo "//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=$NPM_TOKEN" > ~/.npmrc`, and publishes the package using `npm publish`, while setting the production environment with the URL https://www.npmjs.com/package/wdio-webpack-dev-server-service. Also in the release stage add a job named release_snapshot that depends on build, runs only on the master branch, installs jq via `apt-get update` and `apt-get install jq`, writes the same NPM token to ~/.npmrc, computes a new version string by reading the current version from package.json with `VERSION="$(cat package.json | jq -r '.version')"`, creates `NEWVERSION="$VERSION-$CI_COMMIT_SHA"`, updates package.json with `sed --in-place --expression="s/\"$VERSION\"/\"$NEWVERSION\"/" package.json`, and publishes the snapshot using `npm publish --tag next` under a snapshot environment. No additional services or caches are required.
